data.title: US prosecutors caution about romance scams tied to cryptocurrencies before Valentine’s Day, often involving "pig-butchering" schemes.
data.description: Numerous cases are now linked to schemes involving "pig-butchering", which are elaborate scams combining emotional manipulation with fraudulent cryptocurrency platforms.

data.title: U.S. faces pivotal January jobs report Wednesday, including revisions with high stakes; forecasts suggest 45,000 increase in nonfarm payrolls and 4.4% unemployment rate.
data.description: The U.S. labor market awaits the January jobs report, to be released at 8:30 a.m. ET, which includes crucial benchmarks and revisions. The report is significant due to ongoing debates about the market's momentum. Bank of America economist Shruti Mishra dubbed it as the "Super Bowl of jobs reports" due to its importance. Along with January payrolls and unemployment rates, traders will analyze revisions to previous data. Bank of America predicts a 45,000 rise in nonfarm payrolls, lower than consensus, with an expected unemployment rate of 4.4%. This projection accounts for potential adjustments to the birth-death model. The report holds added weight due to its potential impact on market narratives.

data.title: Inspira Technologies receives Nasdaq notification for not meeting minimum bid price, shares below $1.00 for 30 days.
data.description: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., based in Ra'anana, Israel, revealed that they have received a Notification Letter from Nasdaq on February 9, 2026. The letter stated that the company, listed under NASDAQ as IINN and IINNW, is not meeting the minimum bid price requirement outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This is due to the closing bid price of the company's Ordinary Shares falling below $1.00 per share for the past 30 consecutive business days.

data.title: Experts predict Bitcoin nearing turning point, but no clear bottom yet. Valuation metrics still above past cycle lows.
data.description: Important valuation indicators are currently not as low as they have been during previous cycles, with inflation risks continuing to impact digital assets.

data.title: Stingray to have single ticker for TSX trading starting Feb. 13, 2026. World's top streaming media company.
data.description: Montreal-based Stingray Group Inc. declared today that its subordinate voting shares and variable subordinate voting shares will consolidate under one ticker on the Toronto Stock Exchange starting February 13, 2026. As the global leader in connected streaming media, the company's move aims to streamline trading of its shares on the TSX.

data.title: CFTC adds top crypto execs to advisory panel during market structure debate on new rules for digital-asset markets.
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) has appointed top cryptocurrency executives to its advisory panel amidst discussions on implementing new regulations for digital asset markets.

data.title: Alaska car wash offers breakup letters as part of Valentine's Day campaign, customers embrace the unique idea.
data.description: In Anchorage, Alaska on February 14, 2026, CYBER Express Wash took a unique approach to Valentine's Day by offering breakup letters instead of traditional romantic gestures. The car wash company initiated a campaign called "Breakups Are Hard. We'll Handle the Paperwork." which involves sending real USPS certified breakup letters to recipients.

data.title: Roundhill's ETFs for US election are groundbreaking, but risky. Picking losing candidate could mean losing most of investment.
data.description: Investors have been cautioned by the ETF issuer that choosing the fund associated with the unsuccessful US presidential outcome could lead to the potential loss of almost all invested capital.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures pose danger; strategies to mitigate risks discussed with focus on Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia.
data.description: Methods to mitigate the dangers of a volatile market are being discussed amidst the current market conditions. Companies such as Apple, Google, Amazon, Meta, and Nvidia are displaying resilience despite challenges. Investors are advised to consider the situation with Dow Jones Futures. This information has been shared in a recent report by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: "JETOUR in WUHU, China aims to empower mobility with hybrid vehicles amid electric trend." 138 characters
data.description: In WUHU, China on February 14, 2026, new energy vehicles are rapidly increasing in popularity. A key question arises regarding the impact of electrification on mobility. JETOUR has taken on this challenge by introducing a carefully planned hybrid mobility solution.

data.title: Buterin suggests prediction markets transform into hedging platforms for consumer price stability.
data.description: Buterin suggested that prediction markets shift focus from short-term gambling to serving as price stability tools for consumers.

data.title: Ring cancels partnership with Flock Safety after controversy sparked by ad showing reunification of lost dog with family.
data.description: A recently aired commercial showcasing the heartwarming reunion of a lost dog with its family raised worries regarding the potential privacy hazards associated with a "Search Party" functionality. As a result, Ring decided to end its partnership with technology firm Flock Safety.

data.title: Nikita Bier reveals in-app trading to launch in a 'couple' of weeks after hinting in January, hinting at the arrival of Smart Cashtags.
data.description: In January, a preview hinted at the possibility of an in-app trading option, leading to online discussions and buzz surrounding the anticipated Smart Cashtags from X.

data.title: 120th Toy Fair® in NY opens, highlighting play with largest toy show in Western Hemisphere, featuring 4 days of discovery and innovation.
data.description: The biggest toy show in the Western Hemisphere, Toy Fair®, has begun in New York City from Feb. 14 to 17, 2026. The event brings together the global industry for four days of showcasing products, fostering innovation, and conducting business. This year's fair is expected to attract a significant number of participants and visitors, making it a key event for the toy industry worldwide.

data.title: Toy Association unveils 2026 toy trends at 120th Toy Fair®, including "Forever Young" and "Express Yourself".
data.description: 2026 is set to be shaped by key trends including "Forever Young," "Cozy Culture," "Inspiring Inventors," and "Express Yourself." Recently, on Valentine's Day, The Toy Association™ revealed the upcoming toy and play trends at its 120th Toy Fair® in New York. Celebrating the essence of play, this event highlighted the latest trends that are expected to dominate the industry.

data.title: Belo Sun Mining gets Installation License reinstated for Volta Grande Gold Project in Brazil.
data.description: On February 14, 2026, Belo Sun Mining Corp. revealed that the Federal Regional Court has granted acceptance to their appeal to revive the Installation License for the Volta Grande Gold Project situated in Pará State, Brazil. This license had been revoked in 2017. Belo Sun, trading as TSX: BSX and OTCQB: BSXGF, expressed delight over this development.
Ongwe Minerals finalizes reverse takeover and financing, trading to begin soon.

data.title: Physical AI stocks are on the rise as robots and autonomous vehicles expand globally, with Bank of America estimating a trillion-dollar transformation already in progress. Robots, autonomous vehicles, and drones are beginning to scale and operate in the real world, moving intelligence from screens to machines. Nvidia CEO predicts the next wave of AI is physical AI, embedded in the physical world, with systems capable of perceiving environments, reasoning, and executing actions. Robotaxis are already in operation in various cities, and humanoid robots are becoming prominent.
data.description: The article discusses the shift in AI technology from being predominantly screen-based to physical machines that can interact in the real world. This new phase, termed as Physical AI, includes robots assembling cars, self-driving cars, and drones for deliveries. Bank of America's thematic investing team estimates this transformation to be worth trillions of dollars, with value transitioning from digital models to physical machines. Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang emphasizes that machines are beginning to understand, reason, and act in reality, marking the era of Physical AI. The article highlights the difference between the previous AI wave, focusing on content creation, and the new wave, embedding intelligence in physical systems like robots and autonomous vehicles. Robotaxis are already operational in several cities, and advanced driver-assistance systems are expected to achieve mass adoption in China by 2030. The decreasing hardware costs and advancements in onboard computing are set to revolutionize mobility by reducing costs in ride-hailing and freight industries. The rise of humanoid robots is seen as a significant aspect of this technological transformation.

data.title: NowVertical consolidates under one brand, surpasses integration target, enhancing revenue growth for 2026.
data.description: The successful implementation of the One Brand strategy has led to improved operating efficiency and enhanced cross-selling capabilities, positioning the company for scalable growth in 2026. The strategy has resulted in a significant increase in operating leverage and has fortified the company's platform for future expansion. This achievement has set the stage for continued success and development, with promising prospects for the company's growth in the upcoming year.
